findings.donor_label: Defend the Dream PAC (South Padre Island)
findings.label: Texas property-tax/property-owner advocacy PAC
findings.notes: Property-owner PAC founded by former South Padre Island mayor Barry Patel; explicit mission is freezing property tax assessments and protecting 'brick-and-mortar businesses.' Real-estate / property-owner industry advocacy.

evidence.evidence_text: PAC's stated mission is property tax reform and property-owner advocacy.
evidence.snippet: Defend the Dream PAC is a grassroots political action committee formed by Texas property owners... Freeze all property tax assessments of existing properties
evidence.search_query: "Defend the Dream PAC" Texas South Padre Island

evidence.evidence_text: Former South Padre Island Mayor Barry Patel founded PAC to defend property owners.
evidence.snippet: Former South Padre Island Mayor Barry Patel joined us at KURV to talk about his new initiative: the Defend the Dream PAC. The goal is simple but bold: Freeze state property taxes
evidence.search_query: "Defend the Dream PAC" Texas South Padre Island
